rawIntent: Define the LeaveBalance type to include properties: remainingLeaves, usedLeaves, and totalLeaves. Define the LeaveRequest type to include the property leaveType. Ensure these types are correctly exported for use in leave.repository.ts.

successCriteria.description: LeaveBalance and LeaveRequest types are defined with the specified properties and correctly exported in leave.repository.ts.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
outOfScope: Any changes to other modules or domains not mentioned in the intent.
